title: Autototem
description: For Forge and NeoForge. Automatically replaces the totem in the inventory instead of the one you just used
body:
**AutoTotem** is a lightweight quality-of-life mod that automatically replaces a used Totem of Undying.
When the totem in your off-hand activates, the mod instantly pulls another available totem from your inventory and equips it in the off-hand slot.
